steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The underlined sentence begins with “Using data” and describes what the team did with the data—comparing forecasts to actual results. This signals a description of the study’s procedure.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choice
steps.content:
It explains how the researchers gathered and compared information, which is part of the methodology. The other three choices refer to results, an example, or a difficulty, none of which are presented in that sentence.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
